Localization.Description: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2024-38200 in Microsoft Office. This may indicate an NTLM relay attack after a user opens a specially crafted document via a link sent by an attacker and performs NTLM authentication.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Vulnerability {detect} was exploited to forward NTLM authentication from host {event_src.host} to host {dst.host} via host {src.ip}
